title: Cross-Output Determinism Regression Suite
deviation_notes: Prevents the recurring frozen-digest drift captured in lessons-learned (animation_timeline_atlas_packing, mockup_art_pass, head_idiom_fix) by adding a dedicated, always-on determinism guard.
Depends on test_suite_repair_20260724 so the suite starts from a green baseline; the determinism guard itself does not depend on visual acceptance.
Does not re-freeze production digests or admit assets; it pins already-frozen example/fixture outputs and detects drift early.
